content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Indiewalls: Director of Finance Anywhere in the World 🇺🇸 United States of America New York QuickBooks, Power BI, and CPA Management and Finance Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4965/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.indiewalls.com/">https://www.indiewalls.com/</a> </p> <div class="meSK8 M7eMe"><strong>Role Description</strong></div> <div class="spb5Rd OIC90c"> <p>We are seeking a high-energy, hands-on&nbsp;<strong>Director of Finance</strong> who thrives in the intersection of day-to-day execution and long-term strategy. This is a "player-coach" role: while you will have the support of a bookkeeper, you are expected to be deeply involved in the daily financial operations, system optimization, and data integrity. You aren't just reviewing the books; you are mastering them.</p> <p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p><strong>Direct Daily Operations:</strong> Lead and help execute all day-to-day accounting functions, including AP/AR, payroll, and general ledger management. You will be the primary driver of the monthly, quarterly, and annual close processes.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Master QuickBooks Online:</strong> Act as the internal expert for <strong>QuickBooks Online</strong>, ensuring all transactions are categorized correctly and the system is utilized to its full potential for accuracy and scalability.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Proactive Cash Flow Management:</strong> Take full ownership of cash flow, aggressively maintaining low A/R levels and ensuring timely collections to fuel business growth.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Systems &amp; Process Engineering:</strong> Evaluate and "roll up your sleeves" to improve financial systems and internal controls, ensuring our processes are efficient, GAAP-compliant, and audit-ready.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Data &amp; Power BI Integration:</strong> Partner closely with the Reporting Manager to ensure financial data integrates seamlessly into <strong>Power BI</strong>. You will actively engage with dashboards to monitor performance and verify data integrity.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Budgeting &amp; Forecasting:</strong> Lead the development of annual budgets and rolling forecasts, translating operational data into actionable financial roadmaps.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Strategic Advisory:</strong> Provide the executive team with high-level financial insights, leveraging data to inform long-term business planning and sustainable growth.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Mentorship:</strong> Manage and mentor our staff bookkeeper, providing clear direction and fostering a high-performance, collaborative environment.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p><strong>7+ years of experience</strong> in accounting or financial management, with a proven track record of managing "the books" while contributing to "the big picture."</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>B2B Expertise:</strong> Extensive experience in a B2B environment, specifically working with <strong>physical products</strong> and inventory-heavy operations.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>QuickBooks Power User:</strong> Advanced proficiency in <strong>QuickBooks Online</strong> is required; you should be comfortable navigating every corner of the platform.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Technical Literacy:</strong> Ability to work fluently within <strong>Power BI</strong> for data analysis and performance tracking.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Educational Background:</strong> Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field. A CPA is a strong plus but not a requirement.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Mindset:</strong> Highly organized, detail-obsessed, and passionate about building financial systems that support both creativity and scale.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Benefits</strong></p> <p>Salary Range: $100,000 - $150,000 dependent on experience.</p> <p>Fully remote work environment</p> <p>Unlimited PTO</p> <p>Once annual company retreat</p> <p>Opportunity to work with a creative and passionate team transforming spaces through art</p> </div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/indiewalls-director-of-finance">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/indiewalls-director-of-finance</a></p> Sun, 26 Apr 2026 23:32:50 +0000 Tue, 26 May 2026 23:32:50 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/indiewalls-director-of-finance https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/indiewalls-director-of-finance Egear : Senior Google Ads Media Buyer / Performance Marketing Lead Anywhere in the World Florida Google Analytics, Paid Social Media Advertising, and Google Ads All Other Remote Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Florida, USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://egearmedia.com/">https://egearmedia.com/</a> </p> <p>We are looking for someone with experience level: 4–7 years running Google Ads independently, ideally in a performance marketing agency or ecommerce media buying team. Not a generalist digital marketer - a specialist who lives in Google Ads daily. Someone who can take full ownership of our paid search and Performance Max campaigns, bring structure to our account operations, and drive our media buying to consistent profitability.<br><br>Who we are:<br>A fast-growing e-commerce performance marketing agency running direct-to-consumer offers across multiple product verticals including smart devices, health, and outdoor products.<br><br>What you will own<br><br>You will be the most senior hands-on media buyer on the team. This is not a management role where you direct others — you will be in the accounts every day. Specifically you will:<br><br>- Plan, build, and optimise Google Search, Performance Max, Demand Gen, and Display campaigns across multiple product offers and accounts<br>- Set up and maintain full tracking and attribution in RedTrack, including postback URLs, offer parameters, sub-parameter mapping, and conversion event configuration<br>- Diagnose and resolve account-level issues including conversion tracking failures, advertiser verification, billing problems, and campaign ID mismatches<br>- Evaluate each offer independently and give a clear verdict: scale, test a new angle, or cut losses<br>- Brief landing page requirements to our web developer based on performance data, not guesswork<br>- Deliver a written performance report every week covering spend, ROAS, CPA by campaign etc.<br>- Establish and document campaign setup standards so the rest of the team can follow a consistent process<br>- Mentor junior media buyers on campaign architecture and optimisation<br&
